title: Legacy4J Early Java Clasic Skin Pack 1
description: A collection of user-made Skin Pack for the Legacy Skins mod. Adds 40+ skins from 15+ years ago, capturing that early Minecraft style.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f63b855d0276f29ae85ddc65a47dcb1078ea8956.png)


A user-made Skin Pack for the LegacySkins mod. Adds 40+ skins from 15+ years ago, capturing that early minecraft style. From infamous to obscure, this is a curated handpicked set of skins from the early java golden age!

Requires:

[Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)

[Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins)

[Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)
